title: NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Project Associate I Posts
description: National Institute of Technology (NIT), Tiruchirappalli, has released the official Project Associate I Notification 2026. Candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering can use this chance and apply for the NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 . Here we have included the age limit and selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the last date of application. If you a...
